Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ryzer Raithe]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Ryzer Raithe is a shorter, softer version of his brother with thinning white hair and a pale gold third eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Ryzer Raithe's home is a luxurious villa on the edge of a sea on the planet Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — The narrator spoke to Ryzer about being willing to go to war with Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Ryzer helped Raion get an audience with Senator Cyclon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — Ryzer Raithe is the diplomat of the Raithe family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 25''' — Ryzer Raithe is Raion's brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Ryzer is an individual accompanying Raion who is in his element during meetings.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Ryzer Raithe is a person whom the Director of Planetary Security suggested taking into custody.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
